series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence documenting requests for investigating an employee and/or situation within the agency. May include requests for outside agency (i.e., Highway Patrol, Auditor, OIG, etc.) assistance and/or referrals for investigations. Records also include any and all documentation regarding the investigation (i.e., request, referrals, case notes, interviews, preliminary investigations, etc.). (Most documents are originals; some are copies.)Investigations may also contain confidential ODJFS constituent records regarding public assistance, foster care, unemployment compensation, health care, etc. which is protected by law.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Paper: in office completion of investigation or decision not investigate. , Records Center 5 years
